subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth and guideth mankind unto the Most Exalted Horizon, the Station wherein the Lote-Tree speaketh forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و یهدی الناس الی الافق الاعلی المقام الذی تنطق فیه سدره
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude
